פסיכולוגיה PsyPost · Karina Petrova · לפני 8 שע׳

A diverse toy environment is linked to better infant communication skills

A home filled with a diverse array of toys may provide more than just entertainment.

New research links household toy abundance to calmer infant temperaments, richer maternal teaching interactions, and stronger early communication skills.
